---
title: "Blog"
format: html
---

## What i will blog

A collection of occasional deep dives into the tools, topics, and techniques I’m exploring in bioinformatics, cancer research, and AI.

---

## 📚 Recent Posts

- [2025-05-22 — How AI is Changing Life Science Research](2025-05-23_AI in Life Sciences.qmd)
- [2025-06-11 — Engineering to improve the precision and flexibility of crispr editing](2025-06-11_Crispr.qmd)
